title: Resource leak in engineSign() when pre-sign operations fail
problem: The try-finally block only wraps the sm2Sign() call. If calculateZ() or calculateE() throw exceptions (lines 131, 134), releaseSession() will not be called, leaking the SDF session handle.

title: Resource leak in engineVerify() when pre-verify operations fail
problem: The try-finally block only wraps the sm2Verify() call. If calculateZ() (line 156), calculateE() (line 159), or derToRaw() (line 162) throw exceptions, releaseSession() will not be called, leaking the SDF session handle.

title: Missing volatile on sessionHandle for thread safety
problem: sessionHandle is accessed from multiple methods (acquireSession, releaseSession, doFinal) without proper synchronization. While JCE Cipher objects are not required to be thread-safe, the lack of volatile can cause memory visibility issues between constructor and other methods, especially in concurrent scenarios where the object might be shared improperly.

title: Missing volatile on sessionHandle for thread safety
problem: Same as SM4Cipher - sessionHandle should be volatile for proper memory visibility between constructor, acquireSession(), and releaseSession().

title: Missing null check on random byte array before use
problem: The null check is done on 'bytes' but SDFJceNative.generateRandom could return null, which would cause NullPointerException in System.arraycopy.

title: Deprecated Maven javadoc parameter
problem: The -Dadditionalparam flag is deprecated in Maven Javadoc Plugin 3.0+. Use -DadditionalOptions instead for forward compatibility.
